name: W-12 agent declares sonnet model and prompt_id pr-review-conversational per the architecture
command: grep -q 'model: sonnet' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/pr-review-conversational.md" && grep -q 'prompt_id: pr-review-conversational' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/pr-review-conversational.md" && echo ok 1>&2
